title: Tender offer of BINO's shares concluded, Ruhong spent IDR 56.36 billion
body: The portion of Ruhong Holding Pte. Ltd. in PT Perma Plasindo Tbk (BINO) now increases to 89.63% from 72% of total issued and paid-up capital of said issuer, which had just been concluded last week (5/9).

title: State sukuk recorded incoming bids of IDR 21.27 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids for the last auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on September 10, 2024, reportedly reached IDR 21.27 trillion, as stated by DJPPR of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Komarudin Hidayat: Sharia banks can triumph supported by professionalism
body: Prof. Dr. Komarudin Hidayat, Commissioner of PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), believes that sharia banking industry in Indonesia still has potential to rapidly grow if accompanied with professionalism in its development.

title: Islamic Leaders Conference 2024 officially held today
body: Menara Syariah and the Brunei Institute of Leadership & Islamic Finance (BILIF) are collaborating to hold the Islamic Leaders Conference (ILC) 2024 which will be held for two days on September 11-12, 2024, at Menara Syariah, PIK 2.

title: Retail sales expected to decline in October 2024
body: Sales performance in the next six months starting from October 2024 to January 2024 is expected to decline, due to the return to normal demand after national religious holidays and year-end holidays.

title: Tender offer of BINO's shares concluded, Ruhong spent IDR 56.36 billion
body: The portion of Ruhong Holding Pte. Ltd. in PT Perma Plasindo Tbk (BINO) now increases to 89.63% from 72% of total issued and paid-up capital of said issuer, which had just been concluded last week (5/9).

title: State sukuk recorded incoming bids of IDR 21.27 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids for the last auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on September 10, 2024, reportedly reached IDR 21.27 trillion, as stated by DJPPR of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Komarudin Hidayat: Sharia banks can triumph supported by professionalism
body: Prof. Dr. Komarudin Hidayat, Commissioner of PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), believes that sharia banking industry in Indonesia still has potential to rapidly grow if accompanied with professionalism in its development.

title: Islamic Leaders Conference 2024 officially held today
body: Menara Syariah and the Brunei Institute of Leadership & Islamic Finance (BILIF) are collaborating to hold the Islamic Leaders Conference (ILC) 2024 which will be held for two days on September 11-12, 2024, at Menara Syariah, PIK 2.

title: Retail sales expected to decline in October 2024
body: Sales performance in the next six months starting from October 2024 to January 2024 is expected to decline, due to the return to normal demand after national religious holidays and year-end holidays.

title: Idle IPO proceeds of IDR 9.8 trillion, OJK warns Bukalapak.com
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) warns PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA) to immediately use the remaining proceeds of initial public offering (IPO) of IDR 9.8 trillion.

title: SULI’s subsidiary to sign a credit agreement of USD 5 million
body: PT Orimba Alam Kreasi (OAK), one of subsidiaries of PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI), has reportedly signed a credit agreement with ACLF Investments Hong Kong Limited.

title: CMIPD to conduct tender offer for PORT’s shares
body: China Merchants International Port Integrated Development (Hong Kong) Company Limited (CMIPD) is conducting a tender offer of 725.97 million shares of PT Nusantara Pelabuhan Handal Tbk (PORT).

title: LPGI plans a stock split with 1:10 ratio
body: PT Lippo General Insurance Tbk (LPGI) will issue a stock split with a ratio set to 1:10, meaning that one old share will be split into 10 shares with new value.

title: Stable in green zone, net foreign volume surplus at 74.91 million shares
body: Remaining the same from the previous day, net foreign volume on Friday, September 6, was stable in the green zone at roughly 74.91 million shares. This figure was derived from the difference between the foreign sell volume of about 1.72 billion shares and the foreign buy volume of 1.79 billion shares. The list of stock purchase transactions began with the purchase of shares in two banking companies, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) and PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI), with foreign investors purchasing 126 million shares of BBRI for a net volume of 83.37 million shares and 120.60 million shares of BBNI for a net volume of 77.17 million shares.

title: Trimegah Sekuritas now owns 7.29% of Delta Dunia Makmur (DOID)
body: On Thursday, September 5, prevalent securities firm PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk acquired a new stake in PT Delta Dunia Makmur (DOID). Trimegah acquired 557.60 million shares in total, instantly acquiring 7.29% of the parent company that provides contractor services for coal mining.

title: Caught in acquisition rumour, MNC Group denies affiliation with MNC Capital Partners
body: PT MNC Kapital Indonesia Tbk (BCAP) denies the issue of acquisition led by MNC Capital Partners, LP over Vista Outdoor (VSTO.N).

title: KRYA secures new contracts worth IDR 24.65 billion
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA) has secured new contracts worth IDR 24.65 billion in order to fund the construction of warehouse and office of PT Elson Bernardi.

title: Angkasa Pura I and II to be merged to Angkasa Pura Indonesia
body: PT Angkasa Pura I and PT Angkasa Pura II have been officially merged together, becoming PT Angkasa Pura Indonesia (API).

title: Artha Kencana Rayatama issues portion raise in AKRA
body: PT Artha Kencana Rayatama (AKRT) has increased its portion in PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) by acquiring 32.09 million shares.

title: Golden Westindo Artajaya to offer 685.7 million shares in IPO
body: PT Golden Westindo Artajaya Tbk (GWAA), a shrimp and fish seeds’ feed wholesale company, will conduct its Initial Public Offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by issuing 685.7 million shares.

title: Shareholders gave a nod to SMIL’s plan of raising funds
body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL) has gained approval from shareholders to seek new credit facilities or extend its existing credit facilities.

title: Strengthening capital structure, GMFI to hold rights issue
body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI), a subsidiary of PT Garuda Indonesia Tbk (GIAA), will increase its capital with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: Bank Panin to issue bond of IDR 3.91 trillion, coupon set to 7.25%
body: PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNIN), also known as Bank Panin, will issue Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 3.91 trillion.

title: TPMA and SIM to form joint venture
body: PT Trans Power Marine Tbk (TPMA) and PT Samudra Investama Maju (SIM) establish a joint venture in order to acquire 20 sets of tug and barge vessels, as well as 2 units of floating cranes, within the next three years.

title: JCI slowed down at early afternoon session
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was still sluggish until 1.30 PM WIB since morning bell at 10 AM WIB today (9/9).

title: Issuing IDR 1 trillion bond, HRTA to refinance debts and expand retail outlets
body: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond I Year 2024 of IDR 1 trillion. The proceeds of this corporate action will be used to expand retail outlets for gold bars, as well as pay maturing bond principal.

title: Tudung Putra Putri Jaya only owns 10% of Garudafood (GOOD) after releasing 894 million shares
body: On Wednesday, September 4, PT Tudung Putra Putri Jaya released PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) shares once more, with a volume of 894.35 million shares. This investor's stake in the food and beverage company has decreased to just 10% from its previous 12.42% of shares. However, Garudafood chairman and investor Sudhamek Agoeng Waspodo Soenjoto increased his ownership stake by 296.29 million shares, making him an 8% owner overall. The organizer of both transactions was PT Indo Premier Sekuritas.

title: Foreign trading volume remains steady at 1.8 billion shares with net surplus of 33.63 million shares
body: Foreign investors were reported buying and selling stocks on Thursday, September 5, with nearly equal results, with the foreign buying volume was 1.84 billion shares and the foreign selling volume was 1.81 billion shares. These activities then resulted in a net foreign volume surplus of 33.63 million shares. The industrial area development business PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) and the domestic and foreign shipping services company PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL) took the top spot on the share purchase list, with a net volume of roughly 43 million shares each. This amount was established after foreign investors purchased 47.77 million KIJA shares and 53.21 million BULL shares.

title: RIGS’s profit soared 26.35% despite only slight increase in revenue
body: PT Rig Tenders Indonesia Tbk (RIGS) booked net profit of IDR 78.97 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024, up 26.35% year-on-year (yoy) from the same semester last year.

title: Thanks to BRI Empowerment, This MSME Optimizes Bamboo Products to Overseas Markets
body: Unexpected inspiration can actually lead someone to create a new and successful business, as experienced by Adang, a MSME actor in Bandung, who successfully optimized bamboo into various types of crafts and processed food products and is famous internationally.

title: Marketing revenue reached IDR 1.1 trillion, TRIN confident in 2024 target
body: PT Perintis Triniti Properti Tbk (TRIN) or Triniti Land reported marketing revenue of IDR 1.1 trillion as of August 2024, skyrocketing 114% year-on-year (yoy) from August 2023 of IDR 546.9 billion.

title: AirAsia Group explores several funding sources to expand fleet
body: AirAsia Group is reportedly exploring several funding opportunities to back its plan to acquire additional 75 units of aircrafts until 2031.

title: Fundraising in capital market reaches IDR 135.25 trillion as of August 2024
body: The value of funds raised in the Indonesian capital market was recorded at IDR 135.25 trillion until August 2024, according to the Financial Services Authority (OJK).

title: Ancora secures loan facility of IDR 150 billion for refinancing shareholder loan
body: PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk (OKAS) obtains a loan facility with a maximum limit of IDR 150 billion from PT Bank Pan Indonesia Tbk (PNBN).

title: August 2024 saw increases in forex reserves
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) reported an increase in forex reserves in August 2024 following a decline back in February 2024.

title: Following IPO gratification controversy, IDX to renew regulation
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) authority will modify the regulation in the stock market to increase the quality of listed companies, following the controversy of gratification for IPO, leading to contract termination of several employees.

title: Weekend saw JCI breaking new records
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) broke another record throughout today’s (6/9) session.

title: ABBA’s shareholders agreed on board reshuffle
body: Shareholders collectively agreed upon the discharge of two commissioners and two directors of PT Mahaka Media Tbk (ABBA) in Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders yesterday (4/9).

title: Now approved, WIFI to set up rights issue for refinancing purposes
body: Shareholders of PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI) agreed upon the plan of a rights issue of 4.71 billion shares or equal to 66.67% of issued and paid-up capital.
